use_cases: Hero sections on landing pages that reveal content as users scroll
Immersive storytelling websites with depth and movement
Product showcase pages with parallax image transitions
Portfolio or creative agency sites with engaging scroll effects
Marketing pages that want to capture attention with dynamic visuals
ai_summary: A parallax scrolling effect component that creates depth by dynamically zooming out and blurring a background image as users scroll down the page. The component applies smooth opacity transitions and includes browser-specific handling for opaque overlays, making it ideal for creating immersive hero sections and storytelling interfaces in landing pages and marketing sites.
